name: Hyloris Pharmaceuticals SA
summary: Hyloris Pharmaceuticals SA manufactures pharmaceutical products. The company offers cardiovascular products for atrial fibrillation, congestive heart failure, and coronary heart disease; intravenous ready-to-use and oral liquid formulations; and topical gel and cream products. Hyloris Pharmaceuticals SA was founded in 2013 and is based in Liege, Belgium.
